289.issue_title: Epic: Installable Wheel / Standalone MCP Server (phase-gate-mcp)

402.issue_title: tooling: Expose JSON data in MCP tools

cycles.name: Core Architecture Pipeline

deliverables.description: Ensure all pure domain DTOs enforce frozen=True for immutability

cycles.exit_criteria: The server successfully routes a tool call through the factory-assembled decorated pipeline, caches the DTO, and returns pure text to the client.

cycles.name: Batch 1 (Admin, Health & Cycle Tools)

deliverables.description: Enforce frozen=True on all newly defined Batch 1 DTOs

cycles.exit_criteria: All Batch 1 tools return frozen DTOs via ITool.execute(), with green tests.

cycles.name: Batch 2 (Discovery & Project Tools)

deliverables.description: Enforce frozen=True on all Batch 2 DTOs

cycles.exit_criteria: All Batch 2 tools return frozen DTOs via ITool.execute(), with green tests.

cycles.name: Batch 3a (Git Analysis & Info Tools)
cycles.exit_criteria: Git analysis tools successfully migrated and return frozen DTOs, verified by tests.

cycles.name: Batch 3b (Git Mutation & Action Tools)
cycles.exit_criteria: Git mutation tools successfully migrated and return frozen DTOs.

cycles.name: Batch 4a (GitHub Issues & PRs)

deliverables.description: Move GitHub read models to github_models.py

cycles.exit_criteria: GitHub Issue & PR tools successfully migrated and return flattened frozen DTO presentation fields.

cycles.name: Batch 4b (GitHub Labels & Milestones)
cycles.exit_criteria: Label & Milestone tools successfully migrated and return frozen DTOs.

cycles.name: Auto-Fix Tool & MCP Resource Pilot

deliverables.description: Implement AutoFixTool and its DTOs with frozen=True
Implement CachedResponseResource, register it in bootstrap.py
Add declarative presentation template for auto_fix

cycles.exit_criteria: AutoFixTool modifies files correctly; cache evicts oldest runs correctly; and the model successfully retrieves the run's JSON data using read_resource.

cycles.name: Batch 5 (Phase, Scaffold, Quality & Testing Tools)

deliverables.description: Migrate Scaffold artifact and schema tools
Migrate Quality gates, Pytest, Safe edit, and Template validation tools
Enforce frozen=True on all Batch 5 DTOs. Ensure verbose/diff outputs are isolated to JSON

cycles.exit_criteria: Batch 5 tools migrated; JSON separation implemented correctly.

cycles.name: Validation, Quality Gates & Cleanup

deliverables.description: Delete legacy StructuredTool and unused BaseTool execution paths
Clean up any unused legacy converter functions

cycles.exit_criteria: Legacy classes completely removed. All tests pass, and quality gates pass with zero violations.
